name: cocos-mini-packer-spike
description: Headless mini-packer that produces Cocos Creator 3.8 packer-driver-compatible chunks using @cocos/creator-programming-{quick-pack,mod-lo}. Bypasses Creator IDE for TS-only iteration.

notes.runtime-deps: Currently resolved from NPM_ROOT (default: ../../tmp-asar-root/node_modules). To make self-contained, npm-install @cocos/creator-programming-quick-pack@1.7.x and @cocos/creator-programming-mod-lo@1.12.x into this folder.
notes.why-vendored-uuid: Creator's uuid.js is not on npm; carried via NPM_ROOT/../utils/dist/uuid.js. Reimplement compressUUID if you want zero-Cocos deps.
